notes.selection_rule: Use prediction-branch behavior only because alert branch is nearly flat at ~0.50001 and not trustworthy for ranking.
notes.strong_case: Highest usable prediction TTA with solid pred_max.
notes.borderline_cases: Near-threshold / weak-advance cases useful for appendix qualitative contrast.
notes.distinct_scene_case: Case with more night / low-visibility semantics for diversity.
